mapper.sql: id, public_id, tenant_id, library_id, code, name, status, address_json, contact_json, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted_at, version
mapper.update: UPDATE tnt_library_branch SET name = #{name}, status = #{status,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, address_json = CAST(#{addressJson} AS jsonb), contact_json = CAST(#{contactJson} AS jsonb), deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tnt_library_branch WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM tnt_library_branch WHERE library_id = #{libraryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tnt_library_branch WHERE library_id = #{libraryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tnt_library_branch WHERE library_id = #{libraryId} AND LOWER(code) = LOWER(#{code}) AND deleted_at IS NULL
